finding: selection-invalidation effect deps are [sort,query,viewLen] only; hiding the column of a selected cell (same viewLen) leaves an orphaned {kind:'cell',col:hidden} selection whose copy resolves to ''
invalidation keys on viewLen (number) not the viewData reference, so an equal-length dataSource swap leaves stale view-relative selection indices

Ctrl/Cmd+C copy handler sits on a non-focusable wrapper div and cells are not focusable, so after a click-selection activeElement is outside the div and the keydown never reaches the handler — keyboard copy never fires
cell/row selection + Ctrl/Cmd+C has no keyboard path (non-focusable cells + non-focusable wrapper)
selectRow/selectCell mutate anchorRef.current inside the setSelection updater; StrictMode double-invokes the updater running the side effect twice
resize handle role=separator omits aria-valuenow/valuemin/valuemax so AT announces the splitter with no width value or bounds
resize-handle + column-chooser aria-label uses cellString(col.title) → 'Resize column [object Object]' when a title is a ReactNode
onViewChange/onSelectionChange effects depend on the callback prop; inline arrow closures from the viewers make both effects re-run (re-serialising selection) on every render
colMeta() recomputed+re-allocated for every cell in both header and body loops (rows×cols per render) instead of once per visible column

rowsToDelimited applies only RFC-4180 quoting; a cell beginning with =,+,-,@ (or tab/CR) from a viewed (untrusted) file is exported verbatim and executes as a formula when the .csv is opened in Excel/Sheets (CSV injection)
row-count readout hardcodes the plural noun → ungrammatical '1 rows' for a single-row view
column-chooser checkbox for the last remaining visible column is not disabled; clicking it is a silent no-op (guard is behavioral only), a confusing affordance
reviewed: export/copy/parse failures are caught and surfaced via message.error; dynamic import failure already handled; no unhandled rejection
reviewed: no shared mutable races; clipboard writes are fire-and-forget with catch; rAF→setState-after-unmount is a safe React-18 no-op
reviewed: grid changes add only client-side sort/filter over already-fetched rows; the usePermission(MemoryRead) gate and MCP read gate are untouched
reviewed: every new TableProps/TableColumn field is optional; existing root data-testid + ${testid}-row-${key} contract + virtualization preserved; 7 callers compile unchanged (tsc green)

reviewed: numeric align routed through the unchanged alignCls/justifyFor maps (no new text-right literal); kit Button used as Popover trigger; npm run check (colors/logical-direction/guardrails) green
reviewed: unit tests assert real ordering/filter/numeric-cap/selection-serialisation/RFC-4180 behavior (not tautological); seeded gallery surfaces render the real components
